prestazioni: F136 YH 4.7L V8 naturally aspirated engine: Replace the OEM exhaust manifold with a custom 1-7/4-3-6/5-2-8 stainless steel equal-length header system by Capristo, paired with a 3.5-inch titanium exhaust featuring Akrapović Racing Line mufflers and carbon fiber tips for a 22-25 HP gain and aggressive 9,000 RPM tone

F136 YH engine: Install a Motec M150 ECU with a bespoke Trofeo-specific calibration map, integrating a Bosch Motorsport 0261S02085 high-flow fuel pump, ID1000x injectors, and a custom 3.5-bar fuel pressure regulator for optimized AFR targeting 12.8:1 under full load

Chassis: Replace the OEM front subframe with a custom tubular steel unit by Novitec Tridente, featuring adjustable spherical bearing mounts and a reinforced strut tower brace, paired with Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 12-position rebound damping and 24-position compression adjustment, set to 3.5 kg/mm front and 4.2 kg/mm rear spring rates
estetica: Carbon fiber widebody conversion kit by Novitec Tridente, including extended front fenders with integrated LED turn signals, rear quarter panels with functional air vents, and a 3-piece carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust outlets

Custom 20x10.5 ET25 (front) and 21x12.5 ET35 (rear) forged aluminum wheels by HRE Performance Wheels (FF03 model), wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (285/30 R20 front, 325/25 R21 rear), with titanium wheel bolts by ARP

Full carbon fiber interior overhaul by Zender, including a custom 6-point roll cage with integrated fire suppression system, Recaro SPG XL carbon-Kevlar seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, and a MOMO Mod.78 carbon fiber steering wheel with integrated Motec C127 dash display
